sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38841" key="e)phre/mhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπηρέμ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38841.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pause</tr_> between systole and diastole of pulse, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0667.tlg001:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">184</biblScope></bibl>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
